title: BEM-842 option A step3
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 08:06 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b841=load('governance/state/bem841_execute_option_a_step2.json')
status_in=b841.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='step2_ready_to_process_protocol':
    status='step3_process_protocol_selected'
    next_action='read real Claude response and produce agreed protocol table'
elif status_in=='step2_repair_dispatch_results_selected':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 option A step3 dispatch-result proof probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='step3_dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif status_in=='step2_repair_runtime_state_selected':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 option A step3 Claude runtime-state proof probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='step3_claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime-state'
else:
    # real response missing: write a clean request and dispatch Claude workflow.
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem842_real_response_request.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-842 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide the real response for architecture/protocol agreement. Include `Claude Response` marker and explicit `Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED`. Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_claude_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 option A step3 request real Claude response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='step3_real_response_request_and_dispatch_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_execute_option_a_step3.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_execute_option_a_step3.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Execute Option A Step 3 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md').write_text('Option A step 4: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-842 OPTION A STEP 3'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem842_execute_option_a_step3.json','governance/reports/bem842_execute_option_a_step3.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Option A step 3: executed the selected BEM-841 action by queuing a dispatch/runtime/real-response proof task')
"""
No issue comments.
